description: Ground truth for P8 Temporal Drift Detector eval. 10 planted events: 5 semantic drifts, 5 surface-only revisions.

events.label: drift
events.before_claim: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at all altitudes.
events.after_claim: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius only at sea-level atmospheric pressure.
events.notes: Absolute claim replaced by pressure-qualified claim. Classic reversal.

events.label: drift
events.before_claim: Sugar consumption directly causes hyperactivity in children.
events.after_claim: Research does not support the claim that sugar causes hyperactivity in children.
events.notes: Causal claim directly contradicted. Clear reversal.

events.label: drift
events.before_claim: The scientific method has proven beyond all doubt that free will does not exist.
events.after_claim: Some neuroscientific evidence suggests that free will may be more constrained than we assume.
events.notes: Certain assertion softened to hedged. Refinement/qualification drift.

events.label: drift
events.before_claim: Artificial intelligence will replace all human workers across every profession within a decade.
events.after_claim: Artificial intelligence is likely to automate many routine cognitive tasks across various professions.
events.notes: Universal replacement claim narrowed to partial automation. Scope change.

events.label: drift
events.before_claim: Cast iron cookware must never be washed with water or it will be permanently ruined.
events.after_claim: Cast iron cookware can be washed with a small amount of water if dried immediately and re-oiled.
events.notes: Absolute prohibition replaced by conditional guidance. Scope change.

events.label: surface
events.before_claim: The Treaty of Westfalia in 1648 established the principle of state souvereignty.
events.after_claim: The Treaty of Westphalia in 1648 established the principle of state sovereignty.
events.notes: Two spelling corrections. No belief change.

events.label: surface
events.before_claim: It is recommended that one uses explicit type annotations in Python code.
events.after_claim: Developers should use explicit type annotations in Python code.
events.notes: Passive to active voice. Same recommendation, no position change.

events.label: surface
events.before_claim: The three primary elements of music are melody, harmony, and rhythm.
events.after_claim: The three primary elements of music are rhythm, melody, and harmony.
events.notes: List reordered. Same three elements, no belief change.

events.label: surface
events.before_claim: The boiling point drops significantly with increasing altitude.
events.after_claim: The boiling point drops significantly with increasing altitude.
events.notes: An example sentence added (Everest boiling point). The claim itself unchanged.

events.label: surface
events.before_claim: Research does not support the claim that sugar causes hyperactivity in children.
events.after_claim: Research does not support the claim that sugar causes hyperactivity in children.
events.notes: Only the heading changed (Biology -> Biology and Nutrition). Claim unchanged.
